Document:
# Rule 4: ERP Erotic Roleplay (ERP), defined as roleplay intended to elicit a sexual response from the recipient(s), including but not limited to writing fan fiction or posting links to adult content, is strictly prohibited. Such actions will almost always result in a permanent ban from our server.
Administrators reserve the right to make judgment calls on situations to determine whether they constitute a violation of the 18+ or ERP rules. If something is excessively lewd or crosses the line into being an 18+ situation, it may be punishable regardless of intent.
If you are unsure whether something you want to say or do is permissible, please contact AHelp first.
